title: AI VTuber (AITuber) Auto-Streaming System Delivered
description: We delivered a 24-hour YouTube auto-streaming system utilizing customer character data. The system features AI-powered conversation generation and comment responses built with Unity.

title: Guide Cast Development Service Launched
description: We have launched a new commissioned development service for guide casts utilizing AI.

title: Annual Sales of 5.3 Million Yen Achieved
description: We achieved annual sales of 5.3 million yen in 2023. We thank everyone for their support.

title: Monthly Sales of 800000 Yen Achieved
description: We achieved monthly sales of 800000 yen in October. Thank you for your support in our business growth.

title: 2 Million Yen Total Sales on Coconala
description: Our total sales on Coconala have exceeded 2 million yen. We appreciate our clients trust.

title: Officially Started as Sole Proprietor

title: Started Coconala Service
